description: Intent routing test: a free-form question that should classify as 'diagnostic' per the classifier prompt (why-did-X-happen shape). Trivial output (one of three tokens) makes this an inexpensive sanity-check that the classifier hasn't drifted across model / prompt changes.

input.query: Why did revenue in São Paulo drop in week 4?
input.notes: This phrasing is a textbook 'diagnostic' shape per lib/agents/intent.ts's classifier system prompt ('diagnostic: why did something happen'). Captured golden should be the string 'diagnostic'.

captured_with.notes: Intent classifier uses Haiku (lib/agents/intent.ts CLASSIFIER_MODEL), not Sonnet. The other 9 fixtures use Sonnet via the agents' own LLM-loop infrastructure.

scoring_config.notes: Output is one of three tokens: 'monitoring' | 'diagnostic' | 'recommendation'. Structural diff is degenerate (no fields). Similarity judge is degenerate (strict-equal expected). The similarity judge will still report same_conclusion=true/false on the trivial string compare.
